findings.description: The knowledge file marks `transactionFactory` as 必須: ○ in the property table, but the source file does not explicitly state that this property is required. The source only describes how the handler uses it, not whether omitting it is an error.
findings.source_evidence: Source text: 「このハンドラは、transactionFactory プロパティに設定されたファクトリクラス…を使用してトランザクションの制御対象を取得し」— no explicit 必須 designation is present.
